name: Lentils and Leeks
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds leeks, well rinsed and sliced 1/2-inch thick, including some of the green part
2 large carrots, peeled and sliced 1/2-inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, toss the leek and carrot slices with the olive oil.
2. Cook over medium heat for 5 minutes, until the vegetables are lightly browned.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients: water, green lentils, tomato paste, sugar, and salt.
4. Cover the pan and simmer the mixture for 1 hour, until the lentils are tender and most of the liquid has been absorbed.
5. Serve hot.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
